text.title: AI Acceptance Criteria Generator Reviewer Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the reviewer rubric end-to-end on a batch of LLM-drafted AC sets.

step.name: define-dimensions
step.action: Pick 3-7 dimensions (happy/negative/edge/perf/a11y/sec). Write 1/3/5 anchors per dimension; anchors must be behavior-grounded, not "low/medium/high".
step.decision-gate: If any anchor is generic, return to author before scoring starts.

step.name: freeze-weights
step.action: Assign weights summing to 1.0. Record weights_locked_at timestamp before any score is entered.
step.decision-gate: Once locked, any weight change resets the run.

step.name: score-with-evidence
step.action: Each rater scores each dimension and cites evidence (quote, draft line range, log id). Score without evidence is refused at validator.

step.name: reconcile
step.action: If any dimension diverges by >1 point between raters AND stakes ≥$10k, run a reconciliation pass: raters discuss evidence, log rationale, emit reconciled score.
step.decision-gate: If reconciliation does not converge, escalate to BA lead.

step.name: emit-composite
step.action: Compute weighted_total = Σ (score × weight × 20). Validate against output-contract schema. Hand off to story-acceptance gate.
